sentences.arabic: يَقْضِي الْكَثِيرُ مِنَ الشَّبَابِ سَاعَاتٍ طَوِيلَةً أَمَامَ الشَّاشَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi mladi ljudi provode duge sate ispred ekrana.
sentences.translationEn: Many young people spend long hours in front of screens.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْعَادَةُ قَدْ تُؤَدِّي إِلَى مَشَاكِلَ فِي النَّظَرِ وَالنَّوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Ova navika može dovesti do problema sa vidom i spavanjem.
sentences.translationEn: This habit may lead to vision and sleep problems.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الْأَفْضَلِ تَحْدِيدُ وَقْتٍ مُعَيَّنٍ لِاسْتِخْدَامِ الْهَاتِفِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Bolje je odrediti određeno vrijeme za korištenje telefona svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: It is better to set a specific time for phone use every day.
